mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_MESSAGE_TEST ( TEST_SNO, USER_ID, ORG_ID, MESSAGE_ID, TEST_NAME, TEST_DESC, TEST_DATA, TEST_GROUP_ID, TRX_ID, HEADER_YN, XML_YN, DEFAULT_PROXY_YN, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USERID, PROXY_FIELD, PROXY_VALUE ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(TEST_SNO), 0) + 1 FROM FWK_MESSAGE_TEST), #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.orgId}, #{dto.messageId}, #{dto.testName}, #{dto.testDesc}, #{dto.testData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{dto.testGroupId}, #{dto.trxId}, 'N', 'N', 'N', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss'), #{lastUpdateUserId}, NULL, NULL )
mapper.sql: FROM FWK_TRX_MESSAGE tm, FWK_MESSAGE_TEST mt, FWK_ORG o WHERE tm.TRX_ID = mt.TRX_ID AND tm.ORG_ID = mt.ORG_ID AND tm.ORG_ID = o.ORG_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT mt.TEST_SNO, mt.ORG_ID, o.ORG_NAME, mt.TRX_ID, mt.TEST_NAME, mt.TEST_DESC, mt.USER_ID, mt.TEST_DATA
ORDER BY
mt.TEST_SNO o.ORG_NAME mt.TRX_ID mt.TEST_NAME mt.TEST_DESC mt.USER_ID mt.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME
ASC DESC
ORDER BY mt.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME DESC

SELECT mt.TEST_SNO, mt.ORG_ID, o.ORG_NAME, mt.TRX_ID, t.TRX_NAME, mt.MESSAGE_ID, mt.TEST_NAME, mt.TEST_DESC, mt.TEST_DATA, mt.TEST_GROUP_ID, mt.USER_ID FROM FWK_MESSAGE_TEST mt JOIN FWK_ORG o ON mt.ORG_ID = o.ORG_ID JOIN FWK_TRX t ON mt.TRX_ID = t.TRX_ID WHERE mt.TEST_SNO = #{testSno}

SELECT CASE IO_TYPE WHEN 'O' THEN MESSAGE_ID WHEN 'I' THEN NVL(RES_MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_ID) END AS MESSAGE_ID, CASE IO_TYPE WHEN 'O' THEN STD_MESSAGE_ID WHEN 'I' THEN NVL(STD_RES_MESSAGE_ID, STD_MESSAGE_ID) END AS STD_MESSAGE_ID FROM FWK_TRX_MESSAGE WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND TRX_ID = #{trxId} AND IO_TYPE = #{ioType}

SELECT F.MESSAGE_ID, F.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID, F.MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, F.USE_MODE AS ORG_USE_MODE, S.USE_MODE AS STD_USE_MODE, F.DEFAULT_VALUE AS ORG_DEFAULT_VALUE, S.DEFAULT_VALUE AS STD_DEFAULT_VALUE, F.DATA_LENGTH, F.DATA_TYPE, F.ALIGN, F.REQUIRED_YN, F.TEST_VALUE, F.FIELD_TYPE, F.SORT_ORDER, F.SCALE FROM (SELECT * FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}) F LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD WHERE ORG_ID = 'STD' AND MESSAGE_ID = #{stdMessageId}) S ON F.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID = S.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID ORDER BY F.SORT_ORDER
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM FWK_TRX_MESSAGE tm, FWK_MESSAGE_TEST mt WHERE tm.TRX_ID = mt.TRX_ID AND tm.ORG_ID = mt.ORG_ID

SELECT TEST_SNO, TEST_NAME, PROXY_VALUE, DEFAULT_PROXY_YN, USER_ID, PROXY_FIELD FROM FWK_MESSAGE_TEST WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND TRX_ID = #{trxId} AND DEFAULT_PROXY_YN = 'Y'
AND TEST_GROUP_ID = #{testGroupId}
